case.name: Source Layer Brief
case.note: The HTML case intentionally implements read, deck, and map views directly so it can match VMD's multi-view output without a VMD renderer.

metrics.sourceBytes: UTF-8 bytes in the author-facing source file.
metrics.approxTokens: Rough source token estimate using characters / 4.
metrics.authoringOverheadBytes: Source bytes minus visible prose bytes after stripping markup, style, and script.
metrics.standardizedSemanticRoles: Role markers understood by this repository's current format grammar, not ad hoc text labels.
metrics.conventionSemanticHints: Human-readable or class-based hints that are not portable grammar semantics.
metrics.renderModesFromOneSource: Distinct read/deck/map-style views available from the single source in this benchmark.

results.scenario: Semantic visual source rendered by VMD renderer
results.downstreamPath: VMD renderer, browser extension, VS Code extension, or static site builder

results.scenario: Markdown-only source with human-readable role labels
Browser-ready HTML implementing read, deck, and map views manually

vmdVsHtml.browserNativeTradeoff: HTML opens natively today; VMD needs a renderer or extension until native support exists.
